description: Alice cancels the Tuesday 1 PM training session and creates a replacement on Thursday at 1 PM with the same details. Tests delete-and-recreate pattern distinct from a simple update.

events.title: Training Session
events.reasoning: Alice cancels the Tuesday 1 PM training session to reschedule it. Matches calendar event [1].

events.title: Training Session
events.reasoning: A new training session is created on Thursday at 1 PM with the same details as the cancelled Tuesday session.
events.assumptions: Duration and location carried over from the original event as Alice explicitly confirmed 'same duration, same location'.

mock_llm_response.summary: Cancelled Tuesday training session and created replacement on Thursday at 1 PM.

notes: Reference datetime is 2026-02-20 (Friday). Tuesday = 2026-02-24 (delete), Thursday = 2026-02-26 (create). This is a delete+create pair, not a simple update, because Alice explicitly said cancel-then-reschedule. calendar_context[0] so existing_event_id=1.
